name: J1939 Interaction Layer
title: J1939 Interaction Layer
tables: J1939 Only available with J1939. To use the CAPL functions the node layer J1939_IL.DLL must be included. You can include the node layer by using the configuration dialog of the node on page Components or via the node attribute NodeLayerModules in the database.
Callback Functions DTC Support Fault Injection Message Configuration
Node Control Other Functions Signal/Message Access
Is called if an address violation is detected.
Is called from the IL when a Command Address message is received.
Is called if the IL has changed its state.
Is called if an error has occurred.
Is called if a request (0xEA00) is received.
Is called if a message was received successfully.
Is called if a message was sent successfully.
Is called before a parameter group is sent.
Activates or deactivates the support of J1939 diagnostics by the IL.
Activates a diagnostics trouble code (DTC) and add it to the list of active DTCs.
Adds a diagnostics trouble code (DTC) to a diagnostics message.
Clears the list of active DTCs as well as the list of previously active DTCs.
Deactivates a diagnostics trouble code (DTC) and removes it from the list of active DTCs.
Returns the current occurrence count of a diagnostics trouble code (DTC).
Removes a diagnostics trouble code (DTC) from a diagnostics message.
Sets the lamp status of a diagnostics message.
Prevents processing of a received message by the Interaction Layer.
Prevents transmitting of a message generated by the interaction layer.
Delays processing of a received message by the interaction layer.
Modifies the content of a message generated and sent by the interaction layer.
Resets the changes of all J1939ILBlockRxMessage calls.
Resets the changes of all J1939ILBlockTxMessage calls.
Resets the changes of all J1939ILDelayRxMessage calls.
Resets the changes of all J1939ILManipulateMessage calls.
Resets the change of a single J1939ILBlockRxMessage call.
Resets the change of a single J1939ILBlockTxMessage call.
Resets the change of a single J1939ILDelayRxMessage call.
Resets the change of a single J1939ILManipulateMessage call.
Disables the sending of a message.
Re-enables the sending of a disabled message.
Sets the property of a message.
Activates detection of address violations by other nodes.
Checks if the received parameter group is addressed to the J1939 IL.
Suppress the auto-start function of the IL.
Activate node to start Address Claiming.
Deactivates the IL and stops sending cyclic messages.
Returns the address that is used by the J1939 IL.
Returns the current state of the J1939 IL.
Sets the property of a node.
Returns the value of the last called J1939 IL function.
Returns the textual description of the value of the last called J1939 IL function.
Sets verbosity for writing in Write Window.
Sets the data bytes of the message.
Sets the physical value of a signal.
Sets the raw value of a signal.
